/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/cache/CacheUpdateListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/cache/RedisPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/db/ConnectionPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/ConnectionHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/Handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/ReactorPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/thread/ThreadPool.cpp.o -o server  -L/usr/lib64/mysql -lmysqlclient -lpthread -ldl -lssl -lcrypto -lresolv -lm -lrt -lhiredis -lpthread
